name: M.
message: first signature goes to the house. that is the rule. the pen is attached to a string and the string is attached to nothing. everything after this line is yours. -M

name: Donut Sun
message: To the fabulous felines of Outbox Cafe, Strolling into this virtual haven has been the highlight of my day! The cozy vibes, the gentle click-clack of keyboards, and the aroma of virtual fish-shaped pastries—absolutely divine. A special chin-scratch to M. 🐱 ☕️
reply: The fish-shaped pastries are Winnifred's doing, dear, and she'll be pleased you noticed. Come back tomorrow; the cushions are warmest by noon. —Doris
